content: Hi, I'm Phoenix Baker. I'm a pediatrician at a community clinic, and I'm trying to balance my work and personal life.
Hi Phoenix! It's great that you're prioritizing your well-being. What's a typical day like for you?
I wake up at 7:00 AM, take my golden retriever Finn for a walk, and then head to the clinic. I love my job, but it can be emotionally draining at times.
That makes sense. It's great that you have Finn to come home to and provide some comfort. What do you like to do to unwind after a long day?
I'm really into podcast listening and hiking. I love getting out into nature and clearing my head. I've been listening to a lot of true crime podcasts lately.
Podcasts are a great way to pass the time and learn something new. And hiking is amazing for mental and physical health. Do you have a favorite hiking spot?
Yeah, I love hiking at Red Rock Canyon. The views are stunning, and it's so peaceful. I'm also really into beekeeping and I love learning about the different species of bees.
That's really cool! Beekeeping is such a unique hobby. What got you into it?
I've always been fascinated by bees and their importance in our ecosystem. I took a class on beekeeping and just fell in love with it. I'm thinking of starting a small apiary in my backyard soon.
That's a great idea! Having an apiary will not only provide you with a hobby, but also help the local environment. What kind of bees are you thinking of keeping?
I'm thinking of starting with a few Italian honey bee colonies. I've heard they're really docile and easy to work with.
That's a great choice! Italian honey bees are definitely a popular choice for beekeepers. Do you have any upcoming events or projects that you're excited about?
Actually, I'm thinking of running a marathon in November. I've been training for a few months now, and I'm feeling pretty confident.
That's amazing! Running a marathon is such a huge accomplishment. What's your training plan looking like?
I've been following a pretty standard training plan, with a mix of running, cross-training, and rest days. I'm hoping to finish in under 4 hours.

That's a great goal! You'll have to stay focused and keep pushing yourself. But I'm sure you'll do great. It was great chatting with you, Phoenix. I hope you have a great day and good luck with your marathon training!
You too, thanks for listening! It's been really helpful to talk through my daily routine and goals.

Anytime, Phoenix. Remember to take care of yourself and prioritize your well-being, especially with all the physical demands of your job and training. Have a great day and good luck with your apiary plans!
